code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import{Link}from'react-router-dom';import{IconHome}from'../Icons';import{API_BASE}from'../../utils/constants';import{getNoticeStatus,formatNoticeDate}from'../../utils/noticeHelpers';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function NoticePreview(){const[notices,setNotices]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{const fetchNotices=async()=>{try{const res=await fetch(API_BASE+'/api/smart-notices?page=1&limit=5');const json=await res.json();if(json.success){const sorted=[...json.data].sort((a,b)=>{const da=a.creat_pnttm||'';const db=b.creat_pnttm||'';return db.localeCompare(da);});setNotices(sorted);}}catch(err){console.error('공고 로딩 실패:',err);}};fetchNotices();},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card-header",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card-title",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(IconHome,{})," \uC9C0\uC6D0\uC0AC\uC5C5 \uACF5\uACE0"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:"/smart-notices",className:"card-more",children:"\uC804\uCCB4\uBCF4\uAE30 \u2192"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("ul",{className:"notice-list",children:notices.map(notice=>{const status=getNoticeStatus(notice);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("li",{className:"notice-item",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"notice-info",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:'/notices/'+notice.id,className:"notice-name",children:notice.pblanc_nm}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"notice-meta",children:[notice.jrsd_instt_nm," \xB7 ",formatNoticeDate(notice)]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:'badge '+status.cls,children:status.text})]},notice.id);})})]});}export default NoticePreview;
